title: Magic Craft
description: A magic mod that adds magic staffs that have different elements like Fire, Earth, Wind, Lunar, Solar, Lava, Lightning, Ice, Eclipse, Quantum.
body:
# What is this mod
This mod is a magic mod that i am devolping with some cool magic staffs

## Staff Abilities:
- Fire Staff: Shoot fireballs to burn enemies and light up your surroundings.
- Ice Staff: Freeze entities in place with blocks of ice for a short time.
- 
- Lightning Staff: Call down a lightning bolt at a targeted location.
- Earth Staff: Knock back enemies and deal damage with a ground slam.
- Wind Staff: Create a tornado that lifts entities into the air.
- Lava Staff: Control lava to reshape the battlefield or create hazards.
- Quantum Staff: Teleport up to 100 blocks to a safe and open space.
- Solar Staff: Shoots a wall of fire that deals knockback and lights entities on fire.
- Lunar Staff: Shoots a concentrated beam of moonlight that has a long range.
- Eclipse Staff: Creates a black hole that sucks entities in and then implodes.
- Water Staff: Shoots a beam of water at any enemy in your sight
- Obsidian Staff: Encases you in obsidian to protect you for 5 seconds
- How It Works:
- Each staff is crafted using elemental crystals and follows standard crafting recipes.
- particles make the staffs feel cool, and cooldowns make every staff feel balanced.
